column1: Incorporated in 2010, Go Fashion Limited (GFIL) is one of the largest women's bottom-wear brands in India. The company is engaged in the development, design, sourcing, marketing, and retailing of a range of women's bottom-wear products under the brand, 'Go Colors' . The company offers one of the widest portfolios of bottom-wear products among women's apparel retailers in terms of colors and styles. As of May 31, 2021, Go Colors sold bottom-wear in over 50 styles in more than 120 colors. [1]
